options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

**Items:** ensure all logically relevant items can be acquired. Some items, such as keys, may be self-locking, and
some locations may be inaccessible.

options.name: starting_area
options.description:
Starting area for the player.
Some areas require specific entrance randomizer options to be enabled. If the chosen area's
prerequisites aren't met, a uniform re-roll is performed across the remaining valid areas
(a warning is logged); if no valid options remain, falls back to Village of Departure.

Requires vertical_entrances: icefire_treetop.
Requires gate_entrances: divine_fortress, shrine_of_the_frost_giants, takamagahara_shrine,
valhalla, dark_star_lords_mausoleum, ancient_chaos, hall_of_malice.

options.name: starting_weapon
options.description: Starting weapon for the player.

options.name: random_grail
options.description: Randomize the Holy Grail.

options.name: random_scanner
options.description: Randomize the Hand Scanner.

options.name: random_codices
options.description: Randomize the Codices.

options.name: random_fdc
options.description: Randomize the Future Development Company software.

options.name: random_ring
options.description: Randomize the Ring.

options.name: random_shell_horn
options.description: Randomize the Shell Horn.

options.name: random_maps_software
options.description: Randomize Maps & Mapping Software.

options.name: mantra_placement
options.description:
random: Mantras can be anywhere.
only_murals: Mantras are restricted to mural locations.
original: Mantras stay in their vanilla mural locations.

options.name: shop_placement
options.description:
random: All shop items are shuffled.
at_least_one: Each shop is guaranteed at least one non-ammo/weight item.
original: Shops keep vanilla items.
Note: If [original] is selected, FDC, Codices and Hand Scanner cannot not be randomized.

options.name: random_research
options.description:
Add all Kosugi Research Papers into the AP item pool.
If disabled, they will be static untracked locations in-game.

options.name: remove_research
options.description:
Remove Kosugi Research Notes from the item pool.
This means that 10 filler items will take their place.

options.name: remove_maps
options.description:
Removes maps from the item pool.
This means that 16 filler items will take their place.

options.name: required_skulls
options.description: Number of Crystal Skulls required for Nibiru Dissonance.

options.name: remove_excess_skulls
options.description: Remove Excess Crystal Skulls from the item pool.

options.name: random_dissonance
options.description:
All 6 dissonance locations are converted into chests and turns the Beherit into 7 progressive items.
If true, sealing the Corridor of Blood requires all 7 Progressive Beherit in addition to the set GuardianKills.
If false, sealing the Corridor of Blood requires beating Anu and absorbing all dissonance from their original locations.
(Effectively requires beating at least Vritra, Aten-Ra, Anu, Echidna and Hel based on just this flag).

options.name: potsanity
options.description:
Include pots as randomized location checks (WIP).
As of April 2026, 49 pot locations containing filler rewards (coins, weights, ammo). 
Not compatible with legacy seed files.

options.name: required_guardians
options.description:
Only applies if RandomDissonance is on.
Number of Guardians required to be defeated to seal the Corridor of Blood.
Note: the Spiral Boat soul gate value will be adjusted to be at or below this value.
This way, you will always be able to reach the final area without requiring additional guardians.

options.name: guardian_specific_ankhs
options.description: Makes Ankhs only usable at their designated bosses.

options.name: logic_difficulty
options.description:
Logic difficulty setting.
- standard: intuitive logic - certain HP / damage thresholds required for bosses.
- hard: minimal logic - as long as bosses can be theoretically beaten.

options.name: echidna_difficulty
options.description: The Boss Echidna phase difficulty.

options.name: costume_clip
options.description:
Include Glitched logic (i.e. costume clip).
Costume Clip: jump and pause on the same frame.
Once you hear the jump SFX as you open the menu, switch costumes.
This allows you to clip into objects like pots which can push you through walls.

options.name: require_fdc
options.description: Require Future Development Company for backsides.

options.name: dlc_item_logic
options.description: Considers the DLC Item for accessibility.

options.name: life_sigil_to_awaken_hom
options.description:
Require Life Sigil to Awaken Hall of Malice.
If enabled, will consider access to the grail point in logic.

options.name: remove_icefire_treetop_statue
options.description: Remove Icefire Treetop Statue for more accessibility.

options.name: random_cursed_chests
options.description:
Randomize Cursed Chests
Vanilla:
- FlameTorcChest (Surtr)
- GiantsFluteChest (Echidna)
- DestinyTabletChest (Anu)
- PowerBandChest (Belial)

options.name: cursed_chests
options.description: Number of Cursed Chests to randomize.

options.name: horizontal_entrances
options.description: Shuffle horizontal entrances.

options.name: vertical_entrances
options.description: Shuffle vertical entrances.

options.name: gate_entrances
options.description: Shuffle gate entrances.

options.name: unique_transitions
options.description:
Shuffle unique transitions.
(e.g. Annwfn -> Immortal Battlefield / Takamagahara Shrine -> Heaven's Labyrinth)

options.name: full_random_entrances
options.description: Mix the enabled randomized entrances across area types.

options.name: prevent_area_loops
options.description:
Prevent entrance randomization from pairing exits within the same area.
May increase fill success rate if you're having issues with generation.

options.name: soul_gate_entrances
options.description:
Shuffle [1,2,3,5] soul gate entrances with each other.
Note: does not mix with regular the above regular entrances and transitions.

options.name: include_nine_soul_gates
options.description:
Include the two [9] soul gates (HoM to IB Boat) in the Soul Gate pool.
Can work with Soul Gate Entrances and Random Soul Gate Values separately.
Note: [9] soul gate is floored to be reachable depending on player set
RequiredGuardians value if RandomDissonance is enabled.

options.name: random_soul_gate_value
options.description:
Randomize soul gate cost values.
If Soul Gate Entrances is vanilla (false): only shuffle values, keep vanilla pairing.
If Soul Gate Entrances is shuffled (true): shuffle values along with the pairing.

options.name: auto_scan
options.description:
Automatically scan tablets when read.
Requires Hand Scanner in logic if disabled.

options.name: auto_skulls
options.description: Auto-Place Crystal Skulls in Nibiru.

options.name: greedy_charon
options.description:
AP coin grants can be sent by another player at any point, 
which may not be ideal in synced playthroughs. 
Turning this on will make Charon take all your coins as payment, 
so you don't get bricked with additional coins while trying to get to Charon.

options.name: starting_money
options.description: Starting money amount.

options.name: starting_weights
options.description: Starting weights amount.

options.name: item_chest_color
options.description: Color for item chests.

options.name: filler_chest_color
options.description: Color for filler chests.

options.name: ap_chest_color
options.description: Color for AP chests.

options.name: write_seed_file
options.description:
Writes seed.lm2r (standalone compatible) and a seed.lm2ap
For those who wish to play solo seeds outside of AP.
AP generated seeds require both files to play the seed solo offline.
Standalone generated seeds can also be played (will use the original
filler and ankh jewel system).
Seed files need to be placed in La-Mulana 2/LaMulana2Randomizer/Seed

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: [ROY G-1] Birth Seal Gate Shuriken Pot
[ROY C-4] Large Breakable Wall Coin Pot
[ROY D-5] Lamp of Time Weight Pot
[IB C-5] IB Research - Pit of Time
[HOM E-5] Flame Torc Breakable Wall Chest

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: [ROY G-1] Birth Seal Gate Shuriken Pot
[ROY C-4] Large Breakable Wall Coin Pot
[ROY D-5] Lamp of Time Weight Pot
[IB C-5] IB Research - Pit of Time
[HOM E-5] Flame Torc Breakable Wall Chest

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: [ROY G-1] Birth Seal Gate Shuriken Pot
[ROY C-4] Large Breakable Wall Coin Pot
[ROY D-5] Lamp of Time Weight Pot
[IB C-5] IB Research - Pit of Time
[HOM E-5] Flame Torc Breakable Wall Chest

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
